eval_script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /repo
pytest tests/test_utils.py --tb=short -q | tee /tmp/result.txt; tail -1 /tmp/result.txt
exit $?
gold_patch:
diff --git a/pyproject.toml b/pyproject.toml
index dcde263d..dcb537c2 100644
--- a/pyproject.toml
+++ b/pyproject.toml
@@ -53,11 +53,11 @@ security = []
 socks = ["PySocks>=1.5.6, !=1.5.7"]
 use_chardet_on_py3 = ["chardet>=3.0.2,<8"]
 test = [
+    "requests[socks]",
     "pytest-httpbin==2.1.0",
     "pytest-cov",
     "pytest-mock",
     "pytest-xdist",
-    "PySocks>=1.5.6, !=1.5.7",
     "pytest>=3"
 ]
 
diff --git a/tests/test_utils.py b/tests/test_utils.py
index c477c408..31ba00c9 100644
--- a/tests/test_utils.py
+++ b/tests/test_utils.py
@@ -361,9 +361,12 @@ class TestExtractZippedPaths:
         zipped_path = os.path.join(zipped_py.strpath, name.lstrip(r"\/"))
         extracted_path = extract_zipped_paths(zipped_path)
 
-        assert extracted_path != zipped_path
-        assert os.path.exists(extracted_path)
-        assert filecmp.cmp(extracted_path, __file__)
+        try:
+            assert extracted_path != zipped_path
+            assert os.path.exists(extracted_path)
+            assert filecmp.cmp(extracted_path, __file__)
+        finally:
+            os.remove(extracted_path)
 
     def test_invalid_unc_path(self):
         path = r"\\localhost\invalid\location"
problem_statement:
PR: Cleanup extracted file after extract_zipped_path test

With the changes in 66d21cb07bd6255b1280291c4fafb71803cdb3b7 we now create a new extracted file every test run which can clutter the tmp directory. This becomes a problem when running the test suite repeatedly locally. This PR will now enforce cleanup when the test finishes regardless of success.
